text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I need the weight data of each individual first,
though...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Recently, I've had trouble obtaining individual
data due to increased surveillance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With the multiple layers of security on the door
to the data management center, well... you can
imagine what that means for trying to sneak in.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: So, I decided on one particular Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Yes. I mean none other than Air Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Surely she must have a plethora of data hidden
away!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, the plan is to ask for her cooperation! Come
on, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Nope. No way, no how. Try someone else.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, that was quick! Won't you think about it a
bit more?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm not playing around. I worked hard to obtain
this data. I can't just give it away for free.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I see, that makes sense. Well, fine then.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Might I interest you in the next new medicine I'm
developing?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not interested.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Then, what about my prototype
Umamusume-instinct-activation drink...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That doesn't sound very useful. Don't you have
anything a little less intense?
choice_data_list: Do you know who you're talking to?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Are you suggesting my ideas are too
groundbreaking? You want something more
conventional?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... in that case, I do have a dietary capsule
that provides a week's worth of nutrition...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's a bit more like it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's try it out, and if there are no
problems after a week has past, I'll offer you that
weight list.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a deal then! You hear that, Trainer? You'll
need a drink to help the capsule go—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hold on! Hold on! Aren't you supposed to
measure the effects it has on an Umamusume?
You be the one to take it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh... How... logical.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: All right then! Be sure to observe closely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon excitedly pulls out a pill from her
skirt pocket and swallows it with gusto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soon after...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahahahaha! Wheeze! Aha—AHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Heehee! I c-can't... Haha! What's
happening?! I can't stop... AHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well, that's definitely another no.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur leaves with an exasperated look on her
face.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Is it... finally over?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Who knew I would enter a fit of uncontrollable
laughter? It appears my negotiation has failed.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, that puts me back to square one for
obtaining that data. What am I to do?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...I suppose it's the only choice we have. We need
to think of another method...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Oh, I got it! How about hiding a scale in a chair?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We'd probably be caught installing them in the
classroom chairs, but if we target the seats on a
school bus...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay! First we need to get the keys to a bus! I'll
require your help, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how you slice it, this could turn out
badly, so I convince her to give up the bus plan.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
True, we can't focus all our time on getting weight
data.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I say we bet on the chances that this information
will come to us. In the meantime, we should focus
on what can be done now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Time is finite, so we can't afford to waste it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
For the time being, let's try various experiments
on the subject we have available!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon pokes my back with a glint in her
eyes. Soon after, I become the target of a new
phase of her body modification experiments.
